$comment: Selector registry for Tend. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label, full-match). Anchors target the seeded people (src/qa/fixtures.ts). Wrap a card anchor in .* because rows can merge title+subtitle into one a11y label on iOS.

seeded-person.note: the seeded overdue person, top of the list

reached-out-btn.note: primary button on PersonDetail (i18n person.reachedOut) — logs contact

reached-out-confirm.note: status after logging contact (i18n person.lastReachedToday); absent before the tap, present after
